actionCalls.name: Check_Assets_for_Usage_or_Ramps
actionCalls.label: Check Assets for Usage or Ramps

assignments.description: Sets the record ID returned by the amendment invocable action.
assignments.name: Assign_outputRecordId_from_Account_amendRecordId
assignments.label: Assign outputRecordId from Account amendRecordId

assignments.description: Sets the record ID returned by the cancellation invocable action.
assignments.name: Assign_outputRecordId_from_Account_cancelRecordId
assignments.label: Assign outputRecordId from Account cancelRecordId

assignments.description: Sets the record ID returned by the downgrade invocable action (from account).
assignments.name: Assign_outputRecordId_from_Account_downgradeRecordId
assignments.label: Assign outputRecordId from Account downgradeRecordId

assignments.description: Sets the record ID returned by the renewal invocable action.
assignments.name: Assign_outputRecordId_from_Account_renewRecordId
assignments.label: Assign outputRecordId from Account renewRecordId

assignments.description: Sets the record ID returned by the swap invocable action (from account).
assignments.name: Assign_outputRecordId_from_Account_swapRecordId
assignments.label: Assign outputRecordId from Account swapRecordId

assignments.description: Sets the record ID returned by the upgrade invocable action (from account).
assignments.name: Assign_outputRecordId_from_Account_upgradeRecordId
assignments.label: Assign outputRecordId from Account upgradeRecordId

assignments.description: Sets the record ID returned by the downgrade invocable action (from contract).
assignments.name: Assign_outputRecordId_from_Contract_downgradeRecordId
assignments.label: Assign outputRecordId from Contract downgradeRecordId

assignments.description: Sets the record ID returned by the swap invocable action (from contract).
assignments.name: Assign_outputRecordId_from_Contract_swapRecordId
assignments.label: Assign outputRecordId from Contract swapRecordId

assignments.description: Sets the record ID returned by the upgrade invocable action (from contract).
assignments.name: Assign_outputRecordId_from_Contract_upgradeRecordId
assignments.label: Assign outputRecordId from Contract upgradeRecordId

assignments.description: Assign Renewal Term selected by the user.
assignments.name: Assign_Renewal_Term
assignments.label: Assign Renewal Term

assignments.description: Assigns the startDate variable to the date selected in the previous screen
assignments.name: Assign_startDate
assignments.label: Assign startDate

assignments.name: Set_actionTypeNoun_and_actionType_from_selections
assignments.label: Set actionTypeNoun and actionType from selections

assignments.description: Counts the number of product catalogs to determine if selection is needed.
assignments.name: SetCatalogQuantity
assignments.label: Set Catalog Quantity

assignments.description: Sets the selected catalog record variable when only one catalog exists.
assignments.name: SetSingleCatalogVariable
assignments.label: Set Single Catalog Record Variable

choices.description: Choice for overriding the renewal term.
choices.name: IsEarlyRenewal
choices.choiceText: Override Renewal Term

decisions.description: Checks whether the catalog list is empty to determine if product discovery can proceed.
decisions.name: isCatalogListEmpty
decisions.label: Is Catalog List Empty

decisions.description: Checks whether there is exactly one catalog, skipping the catalog selection screen.
decisions.name: IsSingleCatalog
decisions.label: Is Single Catalog

decisions.description: Resolves the action (e.g., amend or cancel) after the user selects a start date
decisions.name: Resolve_Action_After_Date_Screen
decisions.label: Resolve Action After Date Screen

decisions.description: Resolves the action (e.g., amend, renew, or cancel) that invoked the flow
decisions.name: Resolve_Action_From_Flow_Entry
decisions.label: Resolve Action From Flow Entry

decisions.description: Routes to the account or contract path based on whether a contractId was provided.
decisions.name: Swap_from_Account_or_Contract
decisions.label: From Account or Contract

decisions.description: Validates that Rollback assets are not ramped or usage-based before proceeding.
decisions.name: Validate_Rollback_Assets
decisions.label: Validate Rollback Assets

decisions.description: Validates that Transfer assets are not ramped, usage-based, or expired before proceeding.
decisions.name: Validate_Transfer_Assets
decisions.label: Validate Transfer Assets

decisions.description: Routes to the correct contract-path action (Swap, Upgrade, or Downgrade) based on actionType.
decisions.name: What_Action_From_Contract
decisions.label: What Action from Contract

decisions.description: Routes to the correct account-path action (Swap, Upgrade, or Downgrade) based on actionType.
decisions.name: What_Swap_Action
decisions.label: What Action from Account

loops.description: Iterates over filtered catalogs to set the catalog context for product discovery.
loops.name: RunActionForCatalog
loops.label: Run Action for Catalog

recordLookups.description: Queries all product catalogs for the catalog selection step.
recordLookups.name: getProductCatalogs
recordLookups.label: Get Product Catalogs

screens.description: Displays the list of product catalogs for user selection.
screens.name: catalogListScreen
screens.label: List of Catalogs

screens.description: Swap Type (Swap, Upgrade, Downgrade) and Start Date
screens.name: Effective_Date_selector_screen
screens.label: Swap Type and Start Date

screens.description: Displays an error when no product catalogs are available.
screens.name: Label_ProductDiscovery_NoCatalogPresent
screens.label: No Catalogs Present

fields.name: noCatalogErrorMessage
fields.fieldText: Unable to browse catalogs

fields.name: noCatalogErrorDescription
fields.fieldText: To use Browse Catalogs, choose or create a catalog to store the categories.

screens.description: Screen for selecting the renewal term type and dates.
screens.name: Renewal_Term_Selector_Screen
screens.label: Renewal Term Selector Screen

fields.name: Renewal_Date_Selector_Screen_Header
fields.fieldText: Set Renewal Term

fields.name: RenewalDecision
fields.fieldText: This asset subscription automatically renews in accordance with its existing renewal term but you can override the renewal term with different dates here.

validationRule.errorMessage: Enter a renewal term end date for the renewal that’s after the renewal term start date.

fields.name: Early_Renewal_Warning
fields.fieldText: Selecting a renewal start and end date overrides the existing subscription renewal term and creates either a quote or order to refund the unused portion of the subscription.

screens.description: Product list picker screen for selecting swap, upgrade, or downgrade products.
screens.name: Select_Swap_Products
screens.label: Select Products

screens.description: Screen for selecting the start date of the amendment or cancellation.
screens.name: Start_Date_Selector_Screen
screens.label: Start Date Selector Screen

fields.name: Date_Selector_Screen_Header
fields.fieldText: Set {!actionTypeNoun} Date

fields.name: Selected_Start_Date
fields.helpText: You will be able to edit the {!lowercase_actionTypeNoun} dates for each individual asset once you enter the {!outputType}.

validationRule.errorMessage: Provide a date of today or a date in the future.

fields.name: subtype_Selection
fields.fieldText: Use the amendment start date for the subscription start date

fields.name: transfer_header_details
fields.fieldText: Transfer assets by selecting a transfer start date and an account. Optionally, select a contract.

variables.description: Indicates which of the Amend, Renew, or Cancel Invocable Actions to invoke
variables.name: actionType

variables.description: Noun tense of actionType (e.g., if actionType is "Amend", then actionTypeNoun will be"Amendment")
variables.name: actionTypeNoun

variables.description: Stores the count of available product catalogs.
variables.name: CatalogQuantity

variables.description: Context object for the product discovery component.
variables.name: discoverProductsContext

variables.description: API name of the source object (e.g., Asset).
variables.name: objectApiName

variables.description: The type of record to be created as part of this operation. Supported values are Order and Quote.
variables.name: outputType

variables.description: The quantity to add to or reduce from the asset's existing quantity
variables.name: quantityChange

variables.description: The record ID of the source object from which the flow was launched.
variables.name: recordId

variables.description: The asset IDs that are passed in as input to the flow
variables.name: recordIds

variables.description: The product catalog selected by the user for product discovery.
variables.name: selectedCatalog

variables.description: Renewal end date selected by the user.
variables.name: SelectedRenewalEndDate

variables.description: Renewal date selected by the user
variables.name: SelectedRenewalStartDate

variables.description: The effective date for the new amendment/cancellation order/quote
variables.name: startDate
